summary: Frontend-only review of Michael Smith dark portfolio landing page on the public preview URL. Executed an end-to-end Playwright run covering loading screen, navbar smooth-scroll/active state, hero video + name + rotating role + CTAs, Selected Works (4 cards + hover pill), Journal (4 pill entries), Explorations (300vh, 6 parallax cards, lightbox open/close), Stats (3 metrics), and Footer (headline, mailto, marquee, socials, availability indicator). All 13 acceptance criteria are met. No blocking issues found.

ui_bugs.issue: Logo shows 'JA' but the portfolio is for 'Michael Smith' — should likely be 'MS' for brand consistency.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update navbar logo text from 'JA' to 'MS' to match the Michael Smith brand.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx and Footer.jsx duplicate the HLS attach/play/destroy logic — could be extracted into a shared useHlsVideo(src) hook (DRY).

Navbar IntersectionObserver only tracks ids 'home', 'work', 'resume'; sections 'journal' and 'contact' will never set an active link. Acceptable for the current 3-link nav but worth noting if links expand.
LoadingScreen exit transition uses AnimatePresence in Index.jsx but onComplete fires before exit animation; the screen unmounts via state change which still plays the exit. Works as expected.
All interactive elements correctly expose data-testid attributes — good test affordances.
No console errors during load or interaction; horizontal scroll is absent at 1920x1080.
test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Public URL: https://dark-portfolio-react-2.preview.emergentagent.com. Loading screen takes ~3.1s (counter 2.7s + 0.4s delay). Wait at least 4s after navigation before interacting. All data-testid selectors are present and reliable. Verified: loading-screen counter reached 061 at 1.5s and detached after ~4s; hero-name='Michael Smith'; role rotates every 2s (saw Founder→Scholar); 4 project cards w/ Unsplash images load (naturalWidth=1200/1400); hover shows 'View — Title' pill; 4 journal entries; explorations height=3240px (3.0x viewport), 3 left + 3 right cards, lightbox open/close OK; stats 20+ / 95+ / 200%; footer mailto:hello@michaelsmith.com, all 4 socials, marquee 'BUILDING THE FUTURE', 'Available for projects' indicator visible; nav Home/Work/Resume smooth-scroll works (Work top=0, Resume top=92); active nav class applies bg-stroke/50; no horizontal scroll; no console pageerrors. Only cosmetic note: navbar logo shows 'JA' (likely placeholder from template) instead of 'MS' for Michael Smith.
